titles.title: Let the Weight of Your Glory Fall

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Spirit of the Sovereign Lord Come and make Your presence known, Reveal, the glory of the Living God, Spirit of the Sovereign Lord, Come and make Your presence known, Reveal, the glory of the Living God.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Let the weight of Your glory cover us, Let the life of Your river flow, Let the truth of Your kingdom reign in us, Let the weight of Your glory, Let the weight of Your glory fall.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We do not seek Your hand, We only seek Your face, We want to know You, We want to see You, Reveal, Your glory in this place.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Let the weight of Your glory cover us, Let the life of Your river flow, Let the truth of Your kingdom reign in us, Let the weight of Your glory, Let the weight of Your glory fall.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: /: Let the weight of your glory, Let the weight of your glory fall. :/
